Contact

Reach out for research review, reproducibility questions, or collaboration on bounded computational experiments.

Email LinkedIn GitHub

Good Topics

  • Reproducing a run from a command and ledger.
  • Reviewing scoring assumptions or engine docs.
  • Adding tests for edge cases and failure modes.
  • Discussing bounded certificates or formalization boundaries.
